violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (through establishment), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
(The walk in cooler ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair. Metal covering for floor and wall was detached from surface. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table and steam table shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Observed leak at faucet head.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The (ceilings and walls) in the (kitchen and bar area ) area is in poor repair. Observed missing tiles and holes and cracks in walls.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2026
